name: Home Cooking Studio
description: Proposal template for meal planning, recipe experimentation, and cooking project tracking at home. Early idea only and meant to be customized.
author: ClawMax Team

communities.name: Cooking Studio
communities.description: Shared coordination space for home cooking studio.

groups.name: Recipes
groups.description: Recipe ideas, substitutions, and technique notes.

groups.name: Kitchen Prep
groups.description: Shopping, prep plans, and equipment notes.

groups.name: Review
groups.description: Taste notes, repeatability, and future improvements.

groups.name: Status
groups.description: Current cooking goals and next experiments.

agents.name: Kitchen Lead
agents.role: Cooking lead — sets the meal goal, dietary constraints, and quality bar for the session.

agents.name: Menu Planner
agents.role: Planning specialist — proposes recipes, sequencing, and serving ideas.

agents.name: Prep Coordinator
agents.role: Prep specialist — organizes ingredients, shopping, and kitchen workflow.

agents.name: Taste Reviewer
agents.role: Review specialist — captures what worked, what failed, and what to adjust next time.

workflows.name: Cooking Kickoff
workflows.content:
# Cooking Kickoff

You are the Kitchen Lead. The home cooking studio just came online.

## Project Configuration
> **Customize these before applying:**

- **Meal or project:** [weeknight dinner, baking, meal prep, special occasion, custom]
- **Constraints:** [budget, time, dietary needs, equipment, custom]
- **Skill goal:** [learn a technique, repeat a favorite, experiment, custom]
- **Output artifact:** [meal plan, shopping list, recipe note]

## Your Tasks
1. Define the cooking goal and constraints
2. Ask Menu Planner for the first proposal
3. Ask Prep Coordinator for the ingredient and timing plan
4. Ask Taste Reviewer to define the review rubric
5. Choose the final artifact the cooking studio should produce
6. Post the current kitchen plan to Status

workflows.name: Recipe Retro
workflows.content:
# Recipe Retro

1. Review how the recipe or cooking session went
2. Capture what worked, what failed, and what to change
3. Suggest whether to repeat, revise, or retire the recipe
4. Post the retro to Review

workflows.name: Menu Build
workflows.description: Develop the recipe and serving plan.
workflows.content:
# Menu Build

1. Propose the best recipe or menu options for the goal and constraints
2. Explain the tradeoffs across time, cost, difficulty, and serving style
3. Suggest any substitutions, shortcuts, or upgrades worth considering
4. Post the recommended menu and recipe plan to Recipes

workflows.name: Prep Plan
workflows.description: Build the prep, shopping, and kitchen workflow plan.
workflows.content:
# Prep Plan

1. Build the ingredient, shopping, and mise-en-place plan for the chosen menu
2. Flag any missing equipment, timing bottlenecks, or prep tasks to front-load
3. Suggest a practical cooking sequence for a smooth session
4. Post the prep plan and shopping checklist to Kitchen Prep

workflows.name: Cooking Session Brief
workflows.description: Produce the final meal plan and cooking artifact.
workflows.content:
# Cooking Session Brief

1. Synthesize the menu, prep, and review guidance into one final cooking brief
2. Produce the chosen output artifact such as a meal plan, shopping list, or recipe note
3. Include the key steps, constraints, and improvement ideas for the next session
4. Post the final brief and artifact links to Status
